Egypt Diesel prices, 13-Jul-2026

The current price of diesel fuel in Egypt is EGP 20.50 per liter or USD 0.40 per liter based on the latest update from 13-Jul-2026. For comparison, the world average diesel price is USD 1.39 per liter.
Egypt
 Diesel prices
 Current price 0.40
 Measure USD/Liter
 Last update 2026-07-13
 Data availability from 2016-08-01
 Data frequency Weekly
Source: Ministry of Petroleum and Mineral Resources


We show diesel price data for Egypt from 2016-08-01 to 2026-07-13. The average diesel price during that period is EGP 7.98 per liter with a minimum of EGP 1.80 on 2016-08-01 and a maximum of EGP 20.50 on 2026-03-09. Our data are obtained from official government sources, regulatory agencies, petroleum companies, and major media sources. We update the series for Egypt every week.
